scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) returns Document for valid HTML and baseUri
scenarios.precondition: Use a stub TreeBuilder that returns a dummy Document instance for any input
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is the dummy instance from stub
pseudocode:
Parser parser = new Parser(new StubTreeBuilder(returnDoc)); String html="

Hi

"; String baseUri="http://x/";

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) throws UncheckedIOException when Reader.read() fails
scenarios.precondition: Use real StringReader over Reader that throws on first read (IOStubReader)
scenarios.expectedResult: throws java.io.UncheckedIOException; no lock held afterwards
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()); String html = "irrelevant"; String baseUri = "http://x/";
Reader r = new IOStubReader(); // throws IOException on read

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) throws NullPointerException when html is null
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()); String html = null; String baseUri = "http://x/";

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) returns Document for empty HTML string
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(new StubTreeBuilder(emptyDoc)); String html=""; String baseUri="http://x/";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) returns Document for valid Reader and baseUri
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(new StubTreeBuilder(docR)); Reader input = new StringReader("<a/>"); String baseUri="http://u/";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) throws NullPointerException when Reader is null
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()); Reader input = null; String baseUri="http://u/";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) throws NullPointerException when baseUri is null
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(new StubTreeBuilder(returnDoc)); Reader input = new StringReader("<p/>"); String baseUri = null;

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) propagates RuntimeException from treeBuilder.parse
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(new StubTreeBuilder(throw IllegalStateException)); Reader input = new StringReader("x"); String baseUri="u";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) returns Document when Reader has no content
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(new StubTreeBuilder(emptyDoc)); Reader input = new StringReader(""); String baseUri="http://v/";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) closes lock even when treeBuilder.parse throws
scenarios.precondition: Use stub TreeBuilder throwing custom; track lock state externally
scenarios.expectedResult: throws CustomException; lock is unlocked after call
pseudocode: LockMonitor monitor = new LockMonitor(); Parser parser = new Parser(new StubTreeBuilder(throw CustomException, monitor)); Reader input = new StringReader("z"); String baseUri="uri";
